Provider helper for block measurement facts over declared block/max-width deps.

## Import

```ts
import { blockMeasurementProvider } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout";
```

## Signature

```ts
function blockMeasurementProvider(opts: BlockMeasurementProviderOptions): Node<Measurements>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `opts` | `BlockMeasurementProviderOptions` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `Node<Measurements>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { blockMeasurementProvider } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout";
```
